seo.title: Apply to HeartLink | Private Registry
seo.description: Submit a profile for yourself or a family member and select the HeartLink service channel that interests you.

intro.title: Introduce the person, not just a profile.
intro.description: Apply for yourself or on behalf of someone you care for. The private desk uses this first submission to understand the applicant, family context and preferred service channel.

form.introduction: Fields marked required help us verify the applicant and contact the right family member. Information is never placed in a public directory.
form.verificationNote: Every submission is reviewed by a person. HeartLink may contact the nominated representative to verify identity, intent and the most suitable service channel before presenting any profile.
form.consent: I confirm that I am authorised to submit these details, consent to confidential review by HeartLink, and understand that submission does not guarantee an introduction or acceptance into a paid mandate.

faqs.question: Who will see my information?
faqs.answer: Your initial submission is reviewed only by HeartLink’s private admissions desk and its principals. It is not published, indexed or shared with prospective matches.

faqs.question: Can a parent or relative apply?
faqs.answer: Yes. Select that you are applying for someone else, then provide the applicant’s details and the best family contact for the private desk.

faqs.question: What happens after submission?
faqs.answer: If the mandate appears aligned with our current registry and advisory capacity, the private desk will establish a direct verification dialogue before any invitation or commercial discussion.
